milestones.title: MVP — Accept First External League
milestones.description: Everything needed before a non-OGBA league can use the platform.

tasks.title: Set up Stripe account + API keys
instructions: Go to https://dashboard.stripe.com/register and create an account
Verify business details (sole proprietor is fine for now)
Go to Developers → API Keys
Copy the Publishable Key and Secret Key
Add to .env: STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=pk_live_xxx and STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_live_xxx
Also set up a webhook endpoint at /api/stripe/webhook
Create two Products in Stripe Dashboard: 'Pro ($29/season)' and 'Commissioner ($49/season)'

tasks.title: Build Stripe Checkout integration
instructions: Install stripe package: npm install stripe
Create server/src/features/billing/routes.ts with checkout session endpoint
POST /api/billing/checkout — creates a Stripe Checkout session
POST /api/stripe/webhook — handles checkout.session.completed, subscription events
Store subscription status on User model (add isPro, subscriptionId fields)
Gate Pro features behind subscription check middleware

tasks.title: Commissioner self-serve roster import (CSV upload UI)
instructions: Add CSV upload UI to Commissioner page (file input + column mapping preview)
Accept Yahoo/ESPN/Fantrax CSV formats (auto-detect by column headers)
Show preview table before confirming import
Reuse existing auctionImport service on the backend
Add 'Download Template' button with example CSV

tasks.title: New league onboarding wizard (3-step)
instructions: Step 1: Create league (name, format, draft type) — already exists at /create-league
Step 2: Invite members (show invite code + email invite form)
Step 3: Import rosters OR start draft
Add progress indicator (1 of 3, 2 of 3, etc.)
Show 'Setup Checklist' on commissioner page until all steps complete

tasks.title: Email signup backend (Notify Me form)
instructions: Create POST /api/auth/subscribe endpoint
Store email in a new EmailSubscriber table (or use Resend audience)
Validate email format, prevent duplicates
Send welcome email via Resend
Wire up the marketing site form to this endpoint

tasks.title: Marketing site final polish
instructions: Review all 5 blog posts — apply formatting to posts 2-5
Deploy marketing site to GitHub Pages
Set up Monday blog deploy GitHub Action
Verify pricing section matches $0/$29/$49 seasonal model
Test email signup form end-to-end

milestones.title: Mid-Season Leagues — Accept Leagues Already In Progress
milestones.description: Allow commissioners to bring their league over mid-season with existing rosters and standings.

tasks.title: Mid-season roster import workflow
instructions: Allow commissioner to upload current rosters (CSV with player, team, salary)
Auto-match players to MLB IDs via fuzzy name matching
Set acquiredAt to season start date for all imported rosters
Create Period records for completed scoring periods
Mark imported rosters with source='IMPORT' for tracking

tasks.title: Historical stats backfill for current period
instructions: After roster import, trigger stats sync for all rostered players
Backfill PlayerStatsPeriod from season start to current date
Compute TeamStatsPeriod from player stats
Verify standings match FanGraphs/source platform

tasks.title: Skip SETUP → straight to IN_SEASON
instructions: Add 'Import Existing League' option that skips SETUP and DRAFT phases
Set season status directly to IN_SEASON after roster import
Ensure all IN_SEASON features activate (trades, waivers, stats sync)

tasks.title: Yahoo/ESPN/Fantrax CSV format auto-detection
instructions: Detect platform by CSV column headers (Yahoo: 'Player', ESPN: 'PLAYER', Fantrax: 'Player Name')
Map columns automatically to our format
Show preview with auto-detected mappings, allow manual override
Support keeper designation column if present

milestones.title: Growth — Scale Beyond OGBA
milestones.description: Features needed to support multiple leagues and grow the user base.

tasks.title: Multi-league dashboard (league switcher)
instructions: League switcher dropdown in sidebar — DONE
Shows all leagues user is a member of — DONE

tasks.title: Public league directory with detail pages
instructions: Rebuild /discover/:slug detail page (was removed as premature)
Add server-side slug lookup endpoint
Show league details, team list, join CTA
Gate join behind authentication

tasks.title: Referral / invite tracking
instructions: Track which invite code or referral link brought each user
Dashboard showing conversion funnel: invite sent → signed up → joined league
Commissioner can see who hasn't accepted their invite yet

tasks.title: Commissioner analytics dashboard
instructions: League engagement metrics: logins per week, roster moves, trades proposed
Inactive manager alerts (no login in 7+ days)
Season health score (are all managers active?)

milestones.title: Monetization — Charge Money
milestones.description: Revenue infrastructure. Don't rush this — get the product right first.

tasks.title: Stripe subscription management
instructions: Handle subscription lifecycle: create, renew, cancel, pause
Webhook handlers for invoice.paid, invoice.payment_failed, customer.subscription.deleted
Grace period for failed payments (7 days before feature lockout)
Store subscription status on User model

tasks.title: Pro feature gating
instructions: Create requirePro middleware for server routes
Gate AI features (draft report, weekly insights, trade analysis) behind Pro
Show upgrade prompts on gated features for free users
Keep all other features free (drafts, standings, trades, waivers)

tasks.title: Commissioner tier features
instructions: League health dashboard (commissioner-only)
Custom scoring rule builder
Archive import (currently free — move to Commissioner tier)
Priority support badge

tasks.title: Billing portal + invoices
instructions: Stripe Customer Portal link for managing subscription
Invoice history page
Update payment method flow
Cancel/downgrade flow with feedback survey

tasks.title: Founding member lifetime deal ($99)
instructions: Create one-time payment product in Stripe ($99)
Limited to first 100 users
Grants permanent Pro access (no recurring charges)
Show counter: 'X of 100 remaining'
Announce via email list and blog post
